subject: I noticed {company} expanded
body: Hi {first_name}, I noticed {company} expanded into {market} recently. We help companies like yours streamline {value_prop}. Worth a quick chat next week?

subject: Quick question about {company}
body: Hey {first_name}, hope this finds you well. I came across {company}'s recent {trigger_event} and wanted to reach out. We work with {role_keyword} leaders to {value_prop}. Open to a 15-minute conversation?

subject: Saw your post on {topic}
body: Hi {first_name}, I saw your recent post on {topic} and it resonated. We're working with similar {industry} companies to address {pain_point}. Would love to share what we've learned. Worth a quick chat or open to ideas?

subject: Idea for {company}
body: {first_name}, I noticed your role at {company} and had an idea I think could be valuable. We help {industry} leaders {value_prop}. Could potentially save you {benefit}. Worth exploring?

subject: Helping {company} with {pain_point}
body: Hi {first_name}, I might be reaching out at a bad time, but I think we could help {company} with {pain_point}. We've worked with similar {industry} companies. Would you be open to a brief conversation?
